description.value:
Send Prescription processing ingangsdatum-criterium building blocks for patient C. XXX_Brugge
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 1 met onzekerheidscriterium Afhandeling medicatievoorschrift met onzekerheidscriterium
Send Prescription processing ingangsdatum-criterium resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009' or category.coding.code = '373784005').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1189921')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '10138')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '26603')))).count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009' or category.coding.code = '373784005').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1189921')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '10138')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '26603')))).count() = 2

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1189921|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (CHLOORHEXIDINE DIGLUCONAAT CREME 1%)
